title: Gary Lamphier
compiled_truth: Gary Lamphier is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-16 to 2001-10-23), Gary Lamphier sent 56 and received 595 emails, totalling 651 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (23), [Dan Hyvl](people/dan-hyvl) (19), [Martin Cuilla](people/martin-cuilla) (8), [Eric Bass](people/eric-bass) (4), [Robert Lloyd](people/robert-lloyd) (3).
